M

main(String[]) - Static method in class CriteriaPatternDemo
creates list of persons and test various filtering operations
main(String[]) - Static method in class FacadePatternDemo
Creates ShapeMaker and executes its three draw(Shape) methods
main(String[]) - Static method in class FactoryPatternDemo
creates ShapeFactory Object, then generate each shape and draw each shape
main(String[]) - Static method in class SingletonPatternDemo
Displays message from only SingleObject
meetCriteria(List<Person>) - Method in class AndCriteria
Returns List of persons that meet both criteria
meetCriteria(List<Person>) - Method in interface Criteria
Returns List of persons that meet the specified criteria
meetCriteria(List<Person>) - Method in class CriteriaFemale
Returns List of persons that are female
meetCriteria(List<Person>) - Method in class CriteriaMale
Returns List of persons that are male
meetCriteria(List<Person>) - Method in class CriteriaMarried
Returns List of persons that are married
meetCriteria(List<Person>) - Method in class CriteriaSingle
Returns List of persons that are single
meetCriteria(List<Person>) - Method in class OrCriteria
Returns List of persons that meet either criteria
